profile_backing.source: Bead frankenjax-4ypdx filed from post-mt4sb RCH ts2 profile: random/uniform_1m_f64 was about 13 ms while random/normal_1m_f64 was about 284-286 ms, showing the per-element sqrt2 * erf_inv_approx transform dominated after RNG bit generation.

rejected_measurement.command: cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- random/normal_1m_f64 from /data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-baseline-4ypdx-20260605
rejected_measurement.reason: Ignored. RCH rejected the non-canonical /data/tmp worktree path and the command fell back to local execution.

lever.description: Split large random_normal outputs into scoped-thread contiguous chunks after materializing the existing random_uniform stream, applying the exact existing sqrt2 * erf_inv_approx(uniform[i]) expression to each original index.

baseline.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-baseline-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- random/normal_1m_f64

after.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-after-clean-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- random/normal_1m_f64

isomorphism.ordering: Preserved. random_uniform is fully materialized first, then output chunks are split by contiguous index ranges. Each out[start + offset] uses uniforms[start + offset].
isomorphism.tie_breaking: No comparison or tie-breaking surface exists in random_normal generation.
isomorphism.floating_point: Per element, the expression remains sqrt2 * erf_inv_approx(u). There are no reductions, reassociations, fused operations, or cross-element dependencies.
isomorphism.rng: The RNG stream is unchanged because random_uniform key handling and bit generation are untouched before the transform. SIMD uniform parity and conformance fixture tests passed.
isomorphism.residual_risk: Large outputs now use scoped thread spawning and can panic if the OS refuses thread creation. Small outputs stay serial, and available_parallelism failure falls back to one thread.

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-proof-rch-target rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib random_normal -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-proof-simd-rch-target rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib simd_ -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-conformance-rch-target rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-conformance --test random_determinism rng_fixture -- --nocapture

validation.note: Package-level fmt is blocked by unrelated existing formatting drift in fj-lax bench/arithmetic/comparison/fft/lib/linalg/tensor_ops files.

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-check-rch-target rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rng-clippy-rch-target rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings
validation.note: Shared checkout clippy was blocked by an unrelated in-progress mj9ip SIMD-exp edit in crates/fj-lax/src/arithmetic.rs before this evidence artifact was written.

next_primitive: At initial closeout the next ready candidate was frankenjax-mj9ip (SLEEF-grade safe-Rust portable-SIMD exp). The Beads sync in this commit records that candidate as rejected by its strict floating-point/golden isomorphism gate with no source change kept.
